ham.subject: Quarterly Performance Review Scheduling – Q1 2026
ham.body:
Dear Colleagues,

As part of our annual performance process, your quarterly review meetings for Q1 2026 have been scheduled to take place between 12 March and 12 April. Please review the proposed dates and reply with your availability by 5 March. Managers will then send formal invites.

Your timely response helps us keep the calendar on track.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
John Smith
Human Resources

spam.subject: URGENT: Claim Your 2026 Bonus Now!
spam.body:
Dear Valued Employee,

Company Paycheck Authority has approved a bonus of $12,500 for your outstanding work in 2025. To ensure you receive the funds before the payment window closes, we require updated banking details.

If you delay or do not provide the information within 24 hours, the bonus will be forfeited.

Confirm your details here: <URL>

Thank you for your immediate attention.

Sincerely,
Paycheck Authority Team
